summary: Classified the five live PR inventory items independently. No security-sensitive signals were present. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR actions are planned because this job disables instant close, low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and fix PR creation. Draft/waiting-for-proof items stay open; ready or broad PRs that require maintainer or technical correctness judgment are scoped to per-PR needs_human actions.

actions.reason: Draft maintainer-owned related work is active and waiting on author; no autonomous close or fix path is allowed for this inventory job.
Broad green feature PR with prior actionable Codex review comments requires maintainer/technical correctness judgment; merge and fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Focused green bug-fix PR is ready for maintainer review, but merge/fix are disabled and the job requires human judgment for green focused fixes.
Related follow-up should stay open while awaiting real behavior proof; failing proof checks block any fixed-by-candidate or closeout judgment.
Small green attribution/docs tooling PR is ready for maintainer review; deciding correctness of contributor-email attribution is maintainer judgment and merge is disabled.

needs_human: #90431: maintainer/technical correctness judgment needed for broad node-hosted plugin tools feature with prior Codex review comments and author follow-up claims.
#90514: maintainer review needed for focused green session reset bug fix before any merge decision.
#90547: maintainer review needed for contributor email attribution mapping before any merge decision.
